race.comment: HERE SHE IS (2) finds the maiden win elusive but is knocking on the door and finds a suitable race to finally get off the mark. Suspect she finds this a bit easier and the 2kg claim gets her in well. BELLE MONTAGNE (6) flashed home to fill a minor spot two back at Balaklava. Less effective last time and has since been scratched more than a handful of times. Trust if she lines up in this she can put in a good showing. BREAK THE LINE (1) tacked on soundly into third on debut here two weeks ago. Is sure to have come on from that and rates one of the main hopes. BISHOP'S CHOICE (9) was too bad to be true fresh and has since trialled well in-between. Worth another chance. STOOPS (12) resumes and looks best of the rest under the light weight of the claim.
